title: Finance and housing analysis of UK armed forces veterans
body: "This report provides analysis of responses to the Veterans’ Survey 2022, with focus on:   income and money worries veterans that were homeless, rough sleeping, living in a refuge for domestic abuse and living long-term with family or friends   Estimates of veteran responses are provided by personal and service-related characteristics. All UK estimates are weighted percentages. Qualitative analysis contained in this report is unweighted. "
